title: achnatherum thomasii
intro: Achnatherum thomasii, also known as Indian grass, is a perennial grass native to the southwestern United States and Mexico. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it useful for treating various health conditions. The plant has been traditionally used to treat fever, colds, and respiratory issues, as well as to soothe skin irritations and wounds. Achnatherum thomasii can be prepared as an herbal tea, tincture, or salve, and its health benefits include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and boosting the immune system.
